title: LoomHub-de SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Machine-readable single source of truth for a skill's frontmatter (Spec §3.1 + §4). Whitelists for `type` and `category` live here.

name.description: kebab-case; must equal the skill folder name; <= 64 chars.

description.description: What it does + when to use it; keyword-rich; <= 1024 chars.

type.description: Kind of asset / how it installs (Spec §4.1 whitelist).

category.description: General work-activity stage (Spec §4.2 whitelist). Domain words (aws/azure/etl/rag) go in tags, never here.

tags.description: Free-form tags; may be empty; lowercase kebab-case recommended.

source.description: OPTIONAL. Origin URL when this asset was collected/adapted from an external source (Spec §3.1). Omit for team-original assets.

license.description: OPTIONAL. License of the original asset when collected externally (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, or the original author's terms). Omit for team-original assets.

upstream.description: OPTIONAL. 結構化上游追蹤(heartbeat 用)。缺席=不追蹤,heartbeat 跳過。

ref.description: Pinned upstream position to compare against. track=release/tag: the tag_name. track=commit: full 40-char commit SHA of the last-pulled commit.

branch.description: OPTIONAL, track=commit only. Upstream branch to watch (e.g. main). Omit to let GitHub use the upstream repo's default branch.

path.description: OPTIONAL, track=commit only. File path within the upstream repo to scope the commit history to (e.g. engineering/foo.md). Omit to watch the whole repo's latest commit.
